confidence_rationale: Video appears to show only partial task completion through second throw. Third throw and suture cutting phases not clearly visible in provided frames. Suture placement accuracy estimated from available camera angles.

Final suture cutting - not visible in provided frames

improvement_suggestions: Complete task documentation needed to assess full performance
